map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Oh, hi there, fighty fighty time?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: You ever get the feeling you've been here before?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Sometimes I like to stand in the middle of empty rooms and contemplate life.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: This is *not* what I signed up for.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Elbows are best not thought about...

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Why have lunch when we can have battle?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: It's a me, and I'm your problem now!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: I've done it, I finally know how to breathe!
